project.name: Crypto Quant AI Bot
project.description: Hệ thống giao dịch Futures tự động kết hợp phân tích Lượng tử (Pandas-TA) và AI (Gemini 3.1 Pro). Bot nhận lệnh qua Telegram, phân tích đa khung thời gian (4H/1H/15m) với Market Structure & Liquidity (MSL) và gửi báo cáo MTFA chuyên sâu.

features: Quant TA calculation (EMA 34/89/200, RSI, MACD, ADX, BB, ATR)
Market Structure & Liquidity (MSL) Analysis (BOS, CHoCH, FVG)
Candlestick Pattern Detection - Algorithmic (Engulfing, Hammer, ShootingStar, MorningStar, EveningStar)
Gemini 3.1 Pro decision engine with MSL context & Bulkowski knowledge base
Premium Glassmorphism Web Dashboard with live logs, Portfolio PnL & ROI tracking
Security Hardening (PIN-based Kill Switch, Restricted host, .gitignore)
Binance Algo Order Endpoint Support (/fapi/v1/algoOrder for 2026 compliance)
Limit Order Execution for specific entry price adherence
Tailored Trade Risk (USDT) via Telegram commands
Persistent AI Memory Buffer with 60-min freshness TTL and auto-GC
Interactive Shortcut Flow (LLL/SSS) with auto-analysis and trend confluence check
Robust Value Parsing (Safe average for AI range price strings)
Historical Backtesting Engine (backtest.py for Strategy Simulation & ROI Calculation)
Comprehensive System Documentation (USER_GUIDE.md, LOGIC_DIAGRAM.md, BACKTEST_REPORT.md, GIT_GUIDE.md)
Consolidated Git Repository at Root Level (Binance_price)

api_endpoints.explained: Dữ liệu nến cho biểu đồ (Dark Theme)
Kết quả phân tích AI mới nhất
Lấy danh sách vị thế đang mở và PnL
Đóng nhanh một vị thế cụ thể
Tắt bot triệt để (yêu cầu mã PIN)

patterns: Tail implementation for efficient log browsing
PIN-based authentication for critical operations (Kill Switch, Close Position)
Multi-stage Async Cleanup: Stop Telegram -> Close Binance -> 0.5s Grace Period
Bulkowski Candlestick Knowledge Base injected into AI system prompt
Market Structure & Liquidity (MSL) context for institutional trend analysis
Low-level _request_futures_api for non-SDK algoOrder endpoint support
window.APP_STATE pattern for JavaScript global state (tránh TDZ)
gotchas: ValueError: AI may return price ranges (e.g. 100-105) - requires safe_extract_price mean calculation
Binance APIError -4509: closePosition=true requires open position - fix with quantity + reduceOnly=True for pending LIMIT orders
google.genai (new SDK) requires 'models/' prefix for model names
Binance Futures 2026: STOP_MARKET/TAKE_PROFIT must use /fapi/v1/algoOrder endpoint
Binance Algo Order: Param name is 'triggerPrice' - not 'stopPrice'
Browser cache can hold old HTML - use FileResponse and monitor.html rename
